files.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: api-service:1.2.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - labelSelector:
              matchLabels:
                app: api-service
            topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

scope: Auditar configuracao Kubernetes: health checks, anti-affinity, resource limits, seguranca
